title: centaurea scabiosa subsp. calcarea
intro: Centaurea scabiosa subsp. calcarea, also known as the 'Field scabious', is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as soothing digestive problems, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory conditions like bronchitis and asthma. Centaurea scabiosa subsp. calcarea is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
